footer.tagline: Purpose-driven learning: wellbeing, emotional intelligence, and clinical communication for Spanish-speaking professionals.

nosotros.heroTitle: Training the therapists the world needs
nosotros.heroDesc: Centro Yolitia was born from a conviction: that mental health professionals who work with Latino communities deserve specialized, culturally relevant, and clinically rigorous training.
nosotros.missionDesc: To offer specialized, accessible, and high-quality training to mental health professionals who serve or wish to serve Latino populations, strengthening both their clinical competencies and cultural awareness.
nosotros.visionDesc: A world where every Latino person seeking mental health support can find a bilingual, culturally competent professional prepared to accompany them with depth and respect.
nosotros.historyP1: Centro Yolitia began in 2009 as a series of in-person workshops in Miami. Dr. Yoliti Osorio, a clinical psychologist with experience in migrant communities, identified an urgent need: well-intentioned therapists often lacked the vocabulary and cultural sensitivity to effectively serve their Latino patients.
nosotros.historyP2: What began as weekend workshops evolved into a comprehensive online training platform, with courses accredited by professional organizations and students in over 12 countries.

values.title: Cultural dignity
values.desc: We recognize and honor the richness of Latino cultures as an integral part of the therapeutic process.

values.title: Scientific rigor
values.desc: Every course is evidence-based and designed by experts with real clinical experience.

values.title: Accessibility
values.desc: High-quality training available from anywhere, at your own pace, at fair prices.

values.title: Continuous transformation
values.desc: We believe professional learning is a living process, not a one-time event.

team.bio: Clinical psychologist with 25 years of experience. Specialist in intercultural psychotherapy and training of bilingual therapists.
Clinical social worker specializing in supervision and professional training in multicultural contexts.
Doctor of Education with experience in instructional design for health professionals. Manages CEU accreditations.

nosotros.ctaDesc: Be part of a network of over 1,200 professionals committed to clinical excellence and cultural justice in mental health.

contacto.title: Contact us
contacto.sub: We're here to help you find the ideal course for your clinical practice.
contacto.formSub: We respond within 24 hours on business days.
contacto.formPrivacy: I accept the privacy policy and the use of my data to respond to this inquiry.
contacto.formDemo: Demo form — connect your email provider to activate it.
contacto.responseDesc: Average response time is 4 hours on business days. For urgent matters, message us on WhatsApp.

faq.a: Yes, all our courses offer CEUs approved by NASW, NBCC, CAMFT and other organizations. Each course indicates the number of CEUs and the organizations that recognize it.

faq.q: Can I access from any country?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our courses are available online and you can access them from any device with internet connection, anywhere in the world.

faq.q: Do you have a money-back guarantee?
faq.a: Yes. If within the first 30 days you are not satisfied with the course, we will refund 100% of your investment, no questions asked.

faq.q: How long do I have access to the material?
faq.a: Access is lifetime. Once enrolled, you can return to the material as many times as you want with no time limit.

faq.q: Are there group discounts for institutions?
faq.a: Yes. We offer institutional plans with discounts for groups of 5 or more people. Contact us to receive a personalized quote.
